message:
🌱 tikv: Implement CompareAndDelete for the RawKV API (#1025)

* 🌱 Add tikv: Implement CompareAndDelete for the RawKV API mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct PR URL for tikv#18838 CompareAndDelete RawKV API

PR #19371 was closed without merge. PR #19382 (merged 2026-03-14)
is the actual fix implementing CompareAndDelete for the RawKV API.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

+        "description": "### What is changed and how it works?\n\nIssue Number: Close #18838 \n\nThis PR extends the rawkv CompareAndSwap API to allow for key deletions. It allows users to achieve atomic compare and delete semantics. The implementation utilizes a new field `raw_cas_delete` in the `Context` message in\n```yaml\n### Related changes\n\n- [ ] PR to update `pingcap/docs`/`pingcap/docs-cn`:\n- [ ] Need to cherry-pick to the release branch\n\n### Check List\n\nTests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->\n\n- [x] Unit test\n- [ ] Integration test\n- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)\n- [ ] No code\n\nSide effects\n\n- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU\n- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory\n- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility\n\n### Release note\n<!-- \nCompatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note.\n\nPlease refer to [Release Notes Language \n```"

+      "summary": "### What is changed and how it works?\n\nIssue Number: Close #18838 \n\nThis PR extends the rawkv CompareAndSwap API to allow for key deletions. It allows users to achieve atomic compare and delete semantics. The implementation utilizes a new field `raw_cas_delete` in the `Context` message in [kvrpcpb.proto](https://github.com/pingcap/kvproto/commit/3cb428bfb56c52446311d5d4fd40a36119c526a2).",
